heading: Thursday Night
text: Becoming mainly clear. Lows in the low to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the Champlain Valley. West winds 5 to 10 mph early, then becoming light and variable.

heading: Friday
text: Variable clouds. Chance of a shower. Highs in the mid to upper 50s south and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 50s elsewhere north. West winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Any localized evening showers ending. Lows in the low to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Winds becoming light, variable to south, except south to southwest 5 to 10 mph and gusting to 20 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.
